scenario.name: UAC BYE Only
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 3600 3600 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=SIPp c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 6000 RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
